description: CRIT-701 requires `grep -rn "EC-EDIT-0[0-1][0-9]" promptnotes/src/lib/editor/__tests__/ produces 14 distinct ID matches`. Two issues: (a) the regex `0[0-1][0-9]` matches `EC-EDIT-000`, `EC-EDIT-001`..`EC-EDIT-019`, which is broader than the 14 spec'd IDs and may either over-match (if any test mentions `EC-EDIT-015`+, false positive) or under-match. The spec only defines 14 IDs (EC-EDIT-001..014), but the regex also accepts EC-EDIT-000, EC-EDIT-015..019. (b) The threshold counts `distinct ID matches` but `grep -rn` outputs every occurrence with line number, not deduplicated IDs; reviewers must post-process with `sort -u`. The criterion is ambiguous and not directly evaluable.

evidence.snippet: grep -rn "EC-EDIT-0[0-1][0-9]" promptnotes/src/lib/editor/__tests__/ produces 14 distinct ID matches
